stemHtml: An aircraft is climbing at a constant IAS, close to high speed buffet boundary. What should the pilot expect during the climb?

options.a: The nose will drop suddenly due to the onset of Mach buffet.
options.b: CL remains the same as the IAS is constant.
options.c: CL decreases because the Mach No. is decreasing.
options.d: CL increases because Mach No. is increasing.
